case_title: JOSEFINA ENEA VS. DR LEILA MARCUCCI DMV C/O BAY AREA BIRD HOSPITAL

docket_entries.description: SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF, JOSEFINA ENEA. CASE UNDER SUBMISSION.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENEA, JOSEFINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARCUCCI, LEILA DR., DMV C/O BAY AREA BIRD HOSPITAL PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH A CLAIM WITHIN THE JURISDICTION OF THE SMALL CLAIMS COURT. DEFENDANT APPEARED AND PERSONALLY WAIVED DEFECTIVE SERVICE OF CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER (SC-108A): REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER IS "DENIED". COPY OF THE ORDER SENT TO ALL PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ENEA, JOSEFINA AS TO DEFENDANT MARCUCCI, LEILA DR., DMV C/O BAY AREA BIRD HOSPITAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF ENEA, JOSEFINA ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENEA, JOSEFINA AS TO DEFENDANT MARCUCCI, LEILA DR., DMV C/O BAY AREA BIRD HOSPITAL
"ANSWER" TO SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED FROM DEFT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-13-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARCUCCI, LEILA DR., DMV C/O BAY AREA BIRD HOSPITAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MARCUCCI, LEILA DR., DMV C/O BAY AREA BIRD HOSPITAL
